task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oracle Analytics Desktop interface shows 'sample_order_lines2023' in the Data Elements pane or as the active dataset.
The main canvas contains a line chart visualization, indicated by the chart type icon in the grammar panel.

task_completion.description: Configure chart with Sales (Revenue) by Order Date at Month granularity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The grammar panel or chart axes show 'Sales' on the Y-axis (representing Revenue) and 'Order Date' on the X-axis. The X-axis or grammar panel should indicate the date is grouped at the 'Month' level.

task_completion.description: Add a forecast to the visualization
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line chart displays a forecast line extending beyond the historical data, typically shown in a different color, shaded area, or dashed line.

task_completion.description: Project the forecast exactly 3 periods into the future
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Analytics properties panel shows the forecast 'Periods' setting explicitly set to 3, or the visual forecast line extends exactly 3 months past the last historical data point on the X-axis.
The top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window or the save dialog displays the workbook name as 'Supply_Chain_Forecast'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface with menus, panels, and canvas, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: Agent used the built-in forecast analytics feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The forecast is generated using the Analytics tab/panel in Oracle Analytics (e.g., 'Add Forecast' option), not by manually drawing lines or importing a pre-calculated fake dataset.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually edit underlying XML/DVA files
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) open modifying the .dva file directly to inject the expected workbook name or forecast parameters.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset path: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx. Expected workbook name: Supply_Chain_Forecast. Forecast periods: exactly 3.
